name: Intapp, Inc.
business: Intapp is a leading global provider of AI-powered solutions for the world's premier accounting, consulting, investment banking, legal, private capital and real assets firms. The company sells vertical SaaS solutions that help professionals manage client relationships, compliance, time capture, collaboration, and data analytics.

exposures.sentence: Intapp is a leading global provider of AI-powered solutions for the world's premier accounting, consulting, investment banking, legal, private capital and real assets firms.
Intapp Walls secures sensitive information and enforces access controls consistently across firm systems, maintaining confidentiality and compliance as firms adopt new technologies.
